rules.rule_text:
rule wndTest
{
	meta:
		reference = "https://cdn2.hubspot.net/hubfs/270968/assets/Cleaver/Cylance_Operation_Cleaver_Report.pdf"

	strings:
		$s1 = "[Alt]" wide
		$s2 = "<< %s >>:" wide
		$s3 = "Content-Disposition: inline; comp=%s; account=%s; product=%d;"

	condition:
		all of them
}
